title: Verify event: pause-clicked
description: Test that the 'pause-clicked' event is triggered when the user confirms their decision to pause.
preconditions: The Loss Aversion pop-up for pausing is displayed

steps.description: 1. Click the 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access' button

expected_result: The 'pause-clicked' event is fired with page source 'pause pop-up'.
